Matcha God
Creative Direction

Creative Direction

The
Ritual of
Matcha God

A visual content direction built around craft, lifestyle, and community.

Matcha God already has a strong visual hook — a name and mark that feel bold, memorable, and a little mythic. This content direction builds on that without making the brand theatrical.

The goal is to turn preparation, product, and community into a visual ritual customers can recognize, remember, and return to.

View Packages See Creative Direction

The Concept

More than matcha.
A visual world people
can recognize.

Matcha God needs more than a batch of photos. It needs a content library with rhythm — the kind of imagery that explains the product, gives the brand a lifestyle, and makes the community feel real before someone ever walks up to the booth or orders a drink.

The goal is not random photos and reels. The goal is a visual language the brand can repeat across Instagram, website updates, email, events, and future campaigns.

A content library built to turn matcha into ritual, and ritual into brand recognition.

Studio rental, location fees, or permit costs are not included in the package pricing.

Three Content Pillars

Three Pillars. One Vision.

Each pillar gives the brand a different kind of asset, creating a gallery useful across social media, website updates, event promotion, email marketing, and future campaigns.

Pillar 01

The Ritual

The craft of matcha preparation — intentional and almost ceremonial.

  • Whisking and pouring
  • Ingredient details
  • Texture and movement
  • Close-up product imagery
  • The process behind each drink

Pillar 02

The Lifestyle

Where Matcha God belongs in real life — mornings, workdays, Miami.

  • Morning routines
  • Working from a café
  • Reading, journaling, creating
  • Friends sharing a drink
  • Miami lifestyle moments

Pillar 03

The Community

Where the brand becomes human — pop-ups, founders, real connections.

  • Pop-up events
  • Customer interactions
  • Behind-the-scenes moments
  • Founder imagery
  • Genuine connections and conversations

The Deliverables

A library built for
real marketing use.

Every image and reel should have a job. Some assets will sell the quality of the product. Some will make the brand feel approachable. Some will support launches, pop-ups, announcements, and ongoing social content. Nothing is shot speculatively.

01

Product Detail

Close-up visuals that highlight ingredients, process, texture, packaging, and finished drinks.

02

Lifestyle Storytelling

Images and reels that help customers imagine Matcha God as part of their day.

03

Founder & Brand

Portraits and candid moments that make the brand feel human and recognizable.

04

Social & Campaign Assets

Reusable content for Instagram, website, email, event promotion, and brand campaigns.

Choose Your Package

that fits this season.
